title: Program payment
descriptionWithAmount: Pay {{amount}} (full program fee, €1,550 equivalent) via Paystack — Lipa na M-Pesa or card.
descriptionGeneric: Pay the full program fee via Paystack.
phoneHint: Safaricom number (07… or 254…). In Paystack choose Mobile Money — we'll send the STK prompt to this number.
checkoutOpened: Paystack checkout opened — complete payment in the popup.
waitingMessage: Please wait while we confirm your payment.
successBody: Thank you. Your program fee payment is confirmed. Our team will follow up by email with next steps.
verifyError: Payment could not be confirmed. If you were charged, contact support with your reference.
timeout: Payment timed out. If you completed checkout, contact support with your email.
cancelled: Checkout was closed before payment completed.
